description: Notifications service contract v1 — 13 operations across list, channel, delivery, and preferences.

operations.description: Get a specific notification by ID
operations.name: get

operations.description: Query notification delivery history with filters
operations.name: history

operations.description: Get health and delivery stats for a specific channel
operations.name: channel_status

operations.description: Get user notification preferences (channels, quiet hours, categories)
operations.name: preferences

operations.description: Schedule a notification for future delivery
operations.name: schedule

operations.description: Get delivery statistics for a time period
operations.name: delivery_report

operations.description: Send a notification to a channel
operations.name: send

operations.description: Send notifications to multiple channels simultaneously
operations.name: bulk_send

title: notifications-v1
